issue_title: Need For Speed III: Hot Pursuit (1998 not the remaster)
compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Need For Speed III: Hot Pursuit - https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Need_for_Speed_III:_Hot_Pursuit
- Steam AppID of the game: N/A - not on Steam or in SteamDB

## System Information
- GPU/Video driver version/Kernel version: SteamDeck
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/): N/A - not sure how to generate on the SD
- Proton version: I tried Experimental, 8.0-3 and the default on SteamDeck as of the time of writing (not sure how to tell)

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

There are reports for the remaster but not the original. SteamDeck is up to date and I use several versions of Proton to no avail.

<!-- Please add `PROTON_LOG=1 %command%` to the game's launch options and
attach the generated $HOME/steam-$APPID.log to this issue report as a file.
(Proton logs compress well if needed.)-->

## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->

With Proton as it ships on the SteamDeck as of the time of writing, the game won't start at all, it crashes right away. When switching compatibility to force Proton Experimental or 8, the game will run and everything in the menu is fine, but in game, only the background and the HUD renders, not the car or the environment.

## Reproduction

Download NFS III: Hot Pursuit off Archive.org:
https://archive.org/download/need-for-speed-iii-hot-pursuit-win-preinstalled-en/Need_for_Speed_III_Hot_Pursuit_Win_Preinstalled_EN.zip

- Extract the ZIP and copy the folder over to the SteamDeck on an SD card
- Go to Desktop mode and find the folder, copy it over to the SteamDeck's SSD
- Launch Steam in Desktop mode, click on Games > Add a Non-Steam Game and find `nfs3.exe`, add it
- Go back to Gaming mode and launch the game - it will crash
- Use the gear menu and go to Properties > Compatibility and turn of Force the use of a specific Steam Play compatibility tool
- Select Proton Experimental or Proton 8.x
- Launch the game - it launches!
- Configure WASD+Mouse input mapping
- Go through the menu and start a race
- Notice only the backgrounds and the HUD are rendering, not the actual car or the environment (sound plays)

![20230812235133_2](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/assets/6831144/58d325b5-47e0-40eb-b6aa-96a968decb9e)
symptom_summary:
用户在将《帝国时代4》的语言设置为西班牙语后，游戏无法启动，出现黑屏，游戏鼠标可见，但随后关闭。 

Tags: Game Crash, Black Screen, Language Issue

compatibility_report:
Halo: Reach Mod Tools – MCC (1695793)

Issue transferred from https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/7838.
@SOI7 posted on 2024-06-16T15:10:56:

# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Halo: Reach Mod Tools – MCC
- Steam AppID of the game: 1695793

## System Information
- GPU: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1660
- Video driver version: 4.6.0 NVIDIA 535.171.04
- Kernel version: 6.5.0-35-generic
- Linux distro: ZorinOS 17.1
- Proton version: Proton Experimental
- System Information report: [https://gist.github.com/SOI7/c184ae5c2dfb656e89fc78c2824a4252](url)
- Steam Runtime Diagnostic: [https://gist.github.com/SOI7/c793841f5beac01a730ae37426cea4d4](url)

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

Proton Log doesn't generate when I launch the tools

## Symptoms 

All the tools from the editing kit (Tagtest, Sapien and MegaloEdit) launch correctly except Foundation. When you try to launch it, Steam says that .NET Framework 3.5 and 4.5 are needed. 

I tried installing those packages using Protontricks, but Foundation still refuses to open. The only progress I got is making the warning message disappear

## Reproduction

Just start game and select "Launch Foundation"
symptom_summary:
用户在尝试启动Halo: Reach Mod Tools中的Foundation时遇到问题，Steam提示需要.NET Framework 3.5和4.5，但即使使用Protontricks安装这些包，Foundation仍然无法打开。其他工具正常启动。

Tags: Missing Features, Launch Issues, Dependency Errors

issue_title: Call of Duty: Black Ops II - Zombies (212910)
compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Call of Duty: Black Ops II - Zombies
- Steam AppID of the game: 212910

## System Information
- GPU: AMD Radeon RX 5700 XT
- Driver/LLVM version: 4.6 (Compatibility Profile) Mesa 21.2.5
- Kernel version: Linux 5.15.3-zen1-1-zen
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/): [System Info](https://gist.github.com/Uncle-Sagbag/9fda87e96de051beddc7ddab7d38fe82)
- Proton version: Experimental

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

<!-- Please add `PROTON_LOG=1 %command%` to the game's launch options and
attach the generated $HOME/steam-$APPID.log to this issue report as a file.
(Proton logs compress well if needed.)-->

[steam-212910.log](https://gist.github.com/Uncle-Sagbag/5cfbe106babccd0e8079002ae09d5167)

## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->
As described in previous issues, Black Ops 2 Zombies still does not work properly. After a few seconds of launching the game, an Unhandled Exception error pops up, freezing input to the game. The game screen is frozen but music is still playing in the background. Even UI sounds still play (the sounds you hear when changing to the "Settings" screen for example) while the error is up.

I also tested in Proton GE 6.20 and Proton GE 6.21 but found no difference.

## Reproduction

1. Download and install Call of Duty: Black Ops II - Zombies
2. Enable "Proton Experimental" under Settings > Compatibility
3. Press "Launch" on the game
4. The game will launch. After a few seconds, regardless of user input, the game will freeze. An error will pop up stating "unhandled exception caught."

<!--
1. You can find the Steam AppID in the URL of the shop page of the game.
   e.g. for `The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt` the AppID is `292030`.
2. You can find your driver and Linux version, as well as your graphics
   processor's name in the system information report of Steam.
3. You can retrieve a full system information report by clicking
   `Help` > `System Information` in the Steam client on your machine.
4. Please copy it to your clipboard by pressing `Ctrl+A` and then `Ctrl+C`.
   Then paste it in a [Gist](https://gist.github.com/) and post the link in
   this issue.
5. Please search for open issues and pull requests by the name of the game and
   find out whether they are relevant and should be referenced above.
-->

Tags: Unhandled Exception, Freezing, Audio Issues

compatibility_report:
EA Launcher is broken on every Proton Version (example made with NFS Unbound)

Issue transferred from https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/7611.
@maximemelian posted on 2024-03-27T23:19:45:

# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Need for Speed Unbound
- Steam AppID of the game: 1846380

## System Information
- GPU: AMD Radeon RX 7900 XTX
- Video driver version: 24.0.3-2
- Kernel version: 6.8.2
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/maximemelian/64d4b01011e0d6834722ff950018767c):
![grafik](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/assets/20738540/40467bde-3b1b-485e-a00d-dbb420c6925c)
- Proton version: Experimental as of 2024-03-28, but every version crashes the same.

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
  (( I haven't seen this specific game work, neither do I have seen the EA Launcher work, but Origin worked way back, so it did run some time ago. ))
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

Grepping for errors reveals that some Qt5Pdf.dll is missing, I don't quite understand why the copy protection needs to do PDF stuff at this stage of starting up though...

```
[maximilian@shibuya ~]$ cat steam-1846380.log |grep :err: | grep 'dll'
5753.620:0128:012c:err:module:import_dll Library Qt5Pdf.dll (which is needed by L"C:\\\Program Files\\\\Electronic Arts\\\\EA Desktop\\\\EA Desktop\\\\imageformats\\\\qpdf.dll") not found
5760.637:01ec:0204:err:ole:apartment_getclassobject DllGetClassObject returned error 0x80040111 for dll L"C:\\\windows\\\\system32\\\\ieframe.dll"
5761.300:0408:040c:err:module:import_dll Library Qt5Pdf.dll (which is needed by L"C:\\\Program Files\\\\Electronic Arts\\\\EA Desktop\\\\EA Desktop\\\\imageformats\\\\qpdf.dll") not found
5781.034:0408:040c:err:ole:apartment_getclassobject DllGetClassObject returned error 0x80040111 for dll L"C:\\\windows\\\\system32\\\\ieframe.dll"
5784.888:03fc:03f0:err:module:import_dll Library Qt5Pdf.dll (which is needed by L"C:\\\Program Files\\\\Electronic Arts\\\\EA Desktop\\\\EA Desktop\\\\imageformats\\\\qpdf.dll") not found
5785.376:0314:070c:err:ole:apartment_getclassobject DllGetClassObject returned error 0x80040111 for dll L"C:\\\windows\\\\system32\\\\ieframe.dll"
5786.185:053c:0534:err:module:import_dll Library Qt5Pdf.dll (which is needed by L"C:\\\Program Files\\\\Electronic Arts\\\\EA Desktop\\\\EA Desktop\\\\imageformats\\\\qpdf.dll") not found
5788.101:053c:0534:err:ole:apartment_getclassobject DllGetClassObject returned error 0x80040111 for dll L"C:\\\windows\\\\system32\\\\ieframe.dll"
```

Kindly see attached log file for more information.
[steam-1846380.tar.gz](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/14782108/steam-1846380.tar.gz)

## Symptoms
The game wont start at all, as the copy protection EA Launcher crashes with an ominous GUI error. Supposedly background services crashed.

![grafik](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/assets/20738540/4991b2e7-5aa2-491c-917c-325fcc41f681)
![grafik](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/assets/20738540/cd7af829-cf30-4b4f-8cd9-473c220c8cc7)

## Reproduction
- Download NFS Unbound (or any game with EA Launcher copy protection for that matter)
- Start the game first time
- Embrace the crash! :-(
symptom_summary:
用户报告EA启动器在所有Proton版本上均无法正常工作，导致游戏《Need for Speed Unbound》无法启动，并出现GUI错误。背景服务似乎也崩溃了。

**Tags:** Crash, GUI Error, Launcher Issue, Missing DLL

## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->
In-game monitors only show static image (see screenshot), they should play videos. This also applies to in-game video solutions of the puzzles, which makes the game harder as you can't watch the solution videos.
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/19306765/174433634-a28e6ac7-28e8-43f6-9cad-17cacbf19cd0.png)


## Reproduction
1. Start a game
2. wait until a questions mark appears in the top right corner
3. click the question mark and reveal all available hints
4. reveal the video solution

compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Rogue Masters
- Steam AppID of the game: 1063590

## System Information
- GPU: 3060Ti 8GB
- Video driver version: tested on 545.29.02 and 470.223.02 
- Kernel version: 6.6.2-zen-1-zen
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/):
- Proton version: Experimental, 8 and 7
## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

[steam-1063590.log](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/13437872/steam-1063590.log)

## Symptoms
There is three issues which do not happen on windows, same behavior on three different systems (two PC's and one Steam Deck):
1. Regardless of resolution or graphic settings game maxes out VRAM usage. In main menu, lobby and tutorial game runs smooth, once loaded into the actual map FPS drops to 10-15 unless camera is pointed into the sky or floor. Sometimes game causes full system freeze.
2. Videos don't play (they play with proton GE though).
3. Game crashes on attempts to change to fullscreen.

## Reproduction
Run game, start offline lobby, enter any map.
Change presentation mode from the default one to fullscreen.
symptom_summary:
用户在运行《Rogue Masters》时遇到多个问题，包括游戏在加载地图时帧率骤降至10-15，导致系统有时完全冻结；视频无法播放；以及尝试切换到全屏模式时游戏崩溃。

**Tag Suggestions:**  
Performance Issues  
Crashes  
Freezes  
Video Playback  
Fullscreen Issues
